name: Magic Bodysuit Cosplay - TF / Transformation
description:
(CW: Temporary transformation, mental changes) After discovering a mysterious bodysuit just sitting in your room, it seems this convention is going to be much more interesting than you expected. Picturing a character while putting on the Magic Bodysuit allows you to transform into that character- but be careful! The change is mental as well as physical, so you might find yourself getting into character a bit too much...

(Update: Modified personality further, for parity with some of my newer bots.)
creator: Orbital_Lithium
